message:
style(html_export): upgrade typography, fix popover positioning, add CSS fallbacks

Typography and visual refinements for exported HTML sessions:

- Add @font-face declarations for Space Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and
  JetBrains Mono with local() sources and font-display:swap for
  progressive rendering without layout shift
- Switch body font-family from system-ui stack to Space Grotesk /
  IBM Plex Sans for a more distinctive, readable appearance
- Switch header title font from JetBrains Mono to the new sans-serif
  stack (monospace was too heavy for headings)
- Tool badge buttons: add appearance:none/-webkit-appearance:none to
  suppress native button styling across browsers
- Tool popover: change from position:fixed to position:absolute with
  top:calc(100%+8px) and left:0 as the default anchor point, so
  popovers appear directly below their badge without requiring JS
  positioning on initial render
- Add CSS-only hover/focus-within fallback for popovers so they
  display even when JavaScript is disabled or fails
- Search highlights: add box-shadow outlines to .search-highlight and
  .search-current for better visibility against varied backgrounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
